name: Overview_View
SQL: CREATE VIEW Overview_View AS SELECT Status_Analysis.customer_id, Status_Analysis.churn_score, Status_Analysis.cltv, Status_Analysis.churn_label FROM Status_Analysis;

name: Exploration_View_1
SQL: CREATE VIEW Exploration_View_1 AS SELECT Service_Options.customer_id, Service_Options.tenure, Service_Options.number_of_referrals, Status_Analysis.churn_label FROM Service_Options JOIN Status_Analysis ON Service_Options.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id;

name: Exploration_View_2
SQL: CREATE VIEW Exploration_View_2 AS SELECT Online_Services.customer_id, Online_Services.streaming_tv, Online_Services.streaming_movies, Online_Services.streaming_music, Status_Analysis.churn_category FROM Online_Services JOIN Status_Analysis ON Online_Services.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id;
